mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_EMPLOYEE.nextval FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO EMPLOYEE ( EMP_ID, LOGIN_ID, PASSWORD, EMP_NAME, PHONE, EMAIL, DEPT_ID, ROLE_CODE, STATUS, HIRE_DATE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{empId}, #{loginId}, #{password}, #{empName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{deptId}, #{roleCode}, #{status}, #{hireDate}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT E.EMP_ID AS empId, E.LOGIN_ID AS loginId, E.EMP_NAME AS empName, E.PHONE AS phone, E.EMAIL AS email, E.DEPT_ID AS deptId, D.DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, D.DEPT_NAME AS deptName, E.ROLE_CODE AS roleCode, E.STATUS AS status, E.HIRE_DATE AS hireDate, E.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, E.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM EMPLOYEE E LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID WHERE E.STATUS != 'TERMINATED' ORDER BY E.EMP_ID DESC

SELECT E.EMP_ID AS empId, E.LOGIN_ID AS loginId, E.EMP_NAME AS empName, E.PHONE AS phone, E.EMAIL AS email, E.DEPT_ID AS deptId, D.DEPT_NAME AS deptName, E.ROLE_CODE AS roleCode, E.STATUS AS status, E.HIRE_DATE AS hireDate, E.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, E.UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM EMPLOYEE E LEFT JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID WHERE E.EMP_ID = #{empId} AND E.STATUS != 'TERMINATED'
mapper.update: UPDATE EMPLOYEE SET EMP_NAME = #{empName}, PHONE = #{phone}, EMAIL = #{email}, DEPT_ID = #{deptId}, HIRE_DATE = #{hireDate}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND STATUS != 'TERMINATED'
UPDATE EMPLOYEE SET STATUS = 'TERMINATED', LOGIN_ID = SUBSTR(LOGIN_ID, 1, 30) || '_del_' || EMP_ID, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND STATUS != 'TERMINATED'
UPDATE EMPLOYEE SET PHONE = #{phone}, EMAIL = #{email}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND STATUS != 'TERMINATED'
UPDATE EMPLOYEE SET ROLE_CODE = #{roleCode}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND STATUS != 'TERMINATED'
UPDATE EMPLOYEE SET STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId} AND STATUS IN ('ACTIVE', 'INACTIVE')
